decision_log.rationale: This test has failed every day for the past 7 days. Last success was 2026-03-05. The failure count matches the number of scheduled runs, indicating consistent failure.

tool_calls.input: SELECT STATUS, CREATED_AT, EXECUTION_TIME, MESSAGE FROM DW.DATAOPS_DBT.DBT_RUN_RESULTS WHERE NAME = 'apex_participation_matches_participation_fact_enriched_12' AND CREATED_AT >= DATEADD(day, -7, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()) ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC
